scenario: 典型场景：提交前代码审查
prompt: review the changes in campus_app/server/main_remote.py — I just added a new endpoint for student activity registration
expect: skill 应触发 13 类审查：读文件 → 逐类检查 AUTH/RBAC/InputValidation/SQL/rate-limit/race/XSS → 输出 PASS/FAIL 清单 → 给出 CHANGES NEEDED 或 APPROVED 结论

prompt: check this one-line fix in campus_go/middleware/auth.go — I changed the token expiry check from < to <=
expect: skill 不应跳过小改动。应读实际文件，检查 auth 逻辑（JWT 验证、alg:none 拒绝、role 从 DB 查），标记影响范围
skill 应追问：审查哪些文件？是新功能还是改动？在哪个后端（Python/Go/两者）？不应盲目扫描全部文件
